evals.prompt: I want to set up an AI-driven lead generation campaign for my B2B consulting firm
evals.expected_output: Goal-driven campaign setup with landing page, email, and chat widget components

assertions.name: goal_setting
assertions.description: Mentions setting a goal in plain English / natural language

assertions.name: campaign_components
assertions.description: Covers landing page, email automation, and chat widget as campaign components

assertions.name: cal_integration
assertions.description: Mentions Cal.com integration for appointment scheduling

evals.prompt: How do I set up the white-label partner program for my marketing agency?
evals.expected_output: White-label configuration with branding, client management, and partner benefits

assertions.name: client_management
assertions.description: Mentions client account management from one dashboard

assertions.name: partner_support
assertions.description: Mentions partner community access or dedicated support

evals.prompt: I need to build a landing page with an AI form that qualifies leads and books meetings
evals.expected_output: Landing page builder walkthrough with AI form qualification and meeting booking

assertions.name: landing_page_builder
assertions.description: Describes SWAI's native landing page builder (not third-party)

assertions.name: ai_forms
assertions.description: Explains AI-powered forms for lead qualification

assertions.name: meeting_booking
assertions.description: Mentions Cal.com integration for meeting booking
